sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: What matters most about using Spellvault as an MTG inventory tracker.

items.title: What is an MTG inventory tracker?
items.description: An MTG inventory tracker helps you manage cards, copies, locations, and stock in a more usable way.

items.title: Can I track duplicates and stock levels?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault makes it easier to see repeated copies and understand what is available.

items.title: Can I export my inventory?
items.description: Yes. Inventory exports are useful for sharing, reviewing, and keeping a backup.

items.title: Is this useful for stores and sellers?
items.description: Yes. A cleaner inventory is valuable whether you collect privately or manage cards for sale.
